description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style, featuring clean lines and a geometric layout. The exterior is primarily composed of light-colored concrete or stucco, complemented by large glass windows and sections of wood or metal paneling. The property is surrounded by lush greenery, including hedges and small trees, which provide privacy and a natural aesthetic. The house includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and a patio area, as well as a driveway and garage at the front. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large floor-to-ceiling panes and others smaller and more discrete. The main entryway is set back and partially obscured by landscaping, with a sleek, understated door and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, minimalist design, and lush landscaping, featuring a pool and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, and dense greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, horizontal window bands and layered roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, and open patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional windows, the pool, and the integration of landscaping with the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist recessed entry with a sleek door, no porch, and surrounded by dense landscaping
